docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,472.00 FILED BY CONNOR, COURTNEY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CONNOR, COURTNEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JUN-30-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DUNCAN WHEELER (PROPERTY MANAGER) APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF. FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DUNCAN WHEELER (PROPERTY MANAGER) APPEARS ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONNOR, COURTNEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PARTIES AGREED THAT PLAINTIFF WOULD FORFEIT HER RIGHT TO ANY PORTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IN CONSIDERATION OF RELEASE OF FURTHER LIABILITY UNDER THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
